explanations.1: This line declares that the file is XML version 1.0 and uses UTF-8 character encoding, which tells the parser how to read the file correctly.
explanations.3: The category attribute is metadata attached to the book element that classifies what type of book it is, similar to tagging.
explanations.18: XML allows the same element name (author) to appear multiple times in a row when there are multiple values, rather than creating a special 'authors' container.
